title: Tangy Dense Indulgent Thai Pistachio Stir-fry
description: A tangy and indulgent Thai dish featuring pistachio paste, stir-fried with a blend of aromatic spices to create a dense and whole30-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, onions)
1/4 cup finely diced roasted pistachios
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are whole nuts, not ground or paste form

ingredients.name: 1 small onion, thinly sliced
ingredients.notes: Optional for added depth of flavor

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the sunflower oil.
Add the Thai green curry paste to the hot pan, stirring constantly to prevent burning. Cook for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
If using, add sliced onions and cook for an additional minute until softened slightly.
Increase heat to high, then add mixed vegetables. Stir-fry for another 3-5 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
Add finely diced pistachios and fish sauce (if using). Continue stirring to combine all ingredients well.
Remove from heat immediately after the last ingredients have been added, as the stir-fry should be kept hot and dense in texture for a better mouthfeel.
